T0347.title: Table Boss
T0347.definition: A mid-level manager in a gambling ring who organizes games, collects house commissions, extends credit, and oversees operations.
T0347.description: Pa Tou Zi control the core of gambling operations by setting commission rates, issuing high-interest loans, and maintaining order at the table. They serve as a critical link between gang leaders and junior staff, and their activities often involve violent debt collection and illegal detention.
